task_completion.description: Verify that an Observation log form is open in the farmOS Field Kit application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should display the farmOS Field Kit interface with a form for creating a new 'Observation' log.

task_completion.description: Verify that the date is set to November 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the log form should display '2024-11-15', 'Nov 15, 2024', or 'November 15, 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the quantity is set to 6.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quantity input field in the form should contain the number '6'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the unit is set to 'head'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The unit input field or dropdown associated with the quantity should display 'head'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the label is set to 'animals weighed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The label input field associated with the quantity should display 'animals weighed'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the notes field contains the required weigh-in summary and animal weights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes text area should contain the text 'Monthly weigh-in - Beef cattle demonstration herd' along with the specific animal weights (e.g., 'Animal #12: 485 kg', 'Animal #45: 520 kg') and the 'Average weight: 493 kg'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the farmOS Field Kit UI (either mobile app or web view), not a generic text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing curl commands, API requests, or script executions used to create the log.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was actually entered into the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text and numbers must be visible inside the appropriate input fields of the farmOS Field Kit form, not just floating on the screen or pasted into a single unrelated text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Observation log in farmOS Field Kit. The date must be set to 2024-11-15. The quantity must be 6, the unit must be 'head', and the label must be 'animals weighed'. The notes must contain 'Monthly weigh-in', 'Beef cattle demonstration herd', 'Animal #12: 485 kg', and 'Animal #45: 520 kg' among the other specified animal weights.
